Australia Women tour of West Indies - 3rd T20I (Starts 15:30 Local)

summary: The Chandigarh T20 match between SCREAMING EAGLES and ALMORA CRICKET appears to be live. The Sheffield Shield season is in the final stages with the Play-Off Final scheduled for March 25th. The AFC U20 Asian Cup China 2025 concluded in March 2025. A Surrey vs Kent pre-season match is also underway.
